candidates.name: Mailchimp
candidates.one_liner: All-in-one email marketing and automation platform for small businesses.

candidates.name: Klaviyo
candidates.one_liner: Data-driven email and SMS marketing built for ecommerce brands.

candidates.name: Customer.io
candidates.one_liner: Behavior-based messaging platform for product-led and SaaS teams.

candidates.name: beehiiv
candidates.one_liner: Newsletter platform with monetization, growth, and analytics tools for creators.

candidates.name: Resend
candidates.one_liner: Developer-first transactional and marketing email API with React components.

candidates.name: ConvertKit (Kit)
candidates.one_liner: Email marketing and audience platform for creators and newsletter operators.

candidates.name: HubSpot Marketing Hub
candidates.one_liner: CRM-integrated marketing automation with email, landing pages, and workflows.

candidates.name: ActiveCampaign
candidates.one_liner: Email marketing and automation with CRM for SMB and mid-market.

candidates.name: Brevo
candidates.one_liner: Multichannel marketing platform for email, SMS, and WhatsApp campaigns.

candidates.name: Substack
candidates.one_liner: Subscription newsletter platform for independent writers and publishers.

Cookie Preferences
Mailchimp uses cookies for our website to function properly; some are optional and help deliver a personalized and enhanced experience. You can consent to all or allow any level of cookies via “Customize Settings” and preferences can be changed at anytime. To learn more, read our
Cookie Statement
Customize settings
Why do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Mailchimp Sites and Service to operate, and we refer to these as “essential” or “strictly necessary” cookies. Other cookies enable us and the third parties we work with to track and target the interests of Visitors to our Mailchimp Sites, and we refer to these as “performance” or “functionality” cookies. For example, we use cookies to tailor content and information that we may send or display to you and otherwise personalize your experience while interacting with our Mailchimp Sites and to otherwise improve the functionality of the Service we provide. We may use cookies to keep customers signed into their Mailchimp account for 30 days, unless they manually log out, so that they don’t have to enter their username and password every time they visit. We also enable our Members to deploy cookies and similar tracking technologies in connection with their use of our Service in order to allow our Members to track their Contacts or end users. Finally, third parties serve cookies through our Mailchimp Sites and Service for advertising, analytics, and other purposes. This is described in more detail below.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Essential Website Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with the services and features available through our site. Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the site, you cannot refuse them without impacting how the site functions.
View Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
These cookies are used to customize the functionality and performance of the site to enhance your experience. If toggled off, certain functionalities such as personalization and video would become unavailable, though if you’ve checked “keep me logged in”,  you’ll still be signed into your account for 30 days until you log out. See our Cookie Policy for more information.
View Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests. They also perform functions like preventing the same ad from continuously reappearing, ensuring that ads are properly displayed, and in some cases selecting advertisements that are based on your interests.
View Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used or how effective our marketing campaigns are. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and to see how visitors move around the site. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.

Know More, Do More with Mailchimp
Get the most out of Mailchimp with our step-by-step videos and tutorials. Browse by topic or search by feature for 24/7 help with any stage of your business journey.
Search Help Center
Popular guides and tutorials
Know to Grow: Feature guide for smart marketing
Learn how to use our advanced marketing features to understand your customers, create compelling content, and grow your business.
Getting Started with Tags
Tags are labels you create to help organize your contacts in Mailchimp. Learn how to use tags, where to find them, and how to get started.
Requirements and Best Practices for Audiences
An audience of engaged contacts means more sales and a higher return on investment (ROI). Get tips and requirements for maintaining your Mailchimp audience.
Import Contacts to Mailchimp
Learn how to use our import tool to add or update contacts in Mailchimp.
About Mailchimp Pricing Plans
Whether you're starting out or already have a large number of contacts, we have a pricing option for you. Learn about Mailchimp's pricing plans, features, and add-ons.
About SMS Marketing with Mailchimp
Learn about the details of SMS Marketing with Mailchimp.
Quick start video tutorials

Accounts

Audiences

Automation

Data Privacy

Emails
Use Mailchimp to build and send emails for your contacts.
Getting Started

Google Remarketing Ads
Reach potential customers all across the internet with Google remarketing ads.
Integrations
Connect Mailchimp with your e-commerce store and other apps.
Landing Pages
Create standalone web pages your audience can “land” on from emails, ads, or other digital locations.
Mailchimp & Co
Learn how to use the tools that help you manage your clients and the benefits of joining our partner program.
Merge Tags
Personalize your campaigns with contact names, social media buttons, blog posts, and more.
Mobile Apps
Learn how to use Mailchimp on tablets, smartphones, and other mobile devices.
Reports
Get performance stats for your marketing efforts and e-commerce store.
Templates
Use a prebuilt design or code your own templates for email campaigns.
Transactional Email
Send one-to-one e-commerce emails and automated transactional emails with Transactional Email’s delivery service.
Websites
Purchase a domain and create your own website with Mailchimp.
Get help from an expert
Need a hand with template design, using Mailchimp's advanced features, or general marketing strategy? Use our experts directory to find someone who can help you make things happen.
Browse the directory
Still have questions?

additional resources
. And if that doesn't do the trick, you can send an inquiry through our contact form.

Cookie Preferences
Mailchimp uses cookies for our website to function properly; some are optional and help deliver a personalized and enhanced experience. You can consent to all or allow any level of cookies via “Customize Settings” and preferences can be changed at anytime. To learn more, read our
Cookie Statement
Customize settings
Why do we use cookies and other tracking technologies?
We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Mailchimp Sites and Service to operate, and we refer to these as “essential” or “strictly necessary” cookies. Other cookies enable us and the third parties we work with to track and target the interests of Visitors to our Mailchimp Sites, and we refer to these as “performance” or “functionality” cookies. For example, we use cookies to tailor content and information that we may send or display to you and otherwise personalize your experience while interacting with our Mailchimp Sites and to otherwise improve the functionality of the Service we provide. We may use cookies to keep customers signed into their Mailchimp account for 30 days, unless they manually log out, so that they don’t have to enter their username and password every time they visit. We also enable our Members to deploy cookies and similar tracking technologies in connection with their use of our Service in order to allow our Members to track their Contacts or end users. Finally, third parties serve cookies through our Mailchimp Sites and Service for advertising, analytics, and other purposes. This is described in more detail below.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Essential Website Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with the services and features available through our site. Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the site, you cannot refuse them without impacting how the site functions.
View Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
Performance and Functionality Cookies
These cookies are used to customize the functionality and performance of the site to enhance your experience. If toggled off, certain functionalities such as personalization and video would become unavailable, though if you’ve checked “keep me logged in”,  you’ll still be signed into your account for 30 days until you log out. See our Cookie Policy for more information.
View Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you and your interests. They also perform functions like preventing the same ad from continuously reappearing, ensuring that ads are properly displayed, and in some cases selecting advertisements that are based on your interests.
View Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used or how effective our marketing campaigns are. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and to see how visitors move around the site. These cookies may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages.

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Basic email marketing; downgrade target from paid plans

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Entry paid tier; email support, basic automations (price not shown in scrape)

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 6,000 emails/mo, 500 contacts; generative AI, enhanced automations, custom-coded templates

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Top self-serve tier; advanced features, larger contact volumes (price not shown in scrape)

pricing.notes: Contact-based pricing scales by audience size (500 up to 1M+). 15% off first 12 months for 10,000+ contacts. Overages apply if contact or email send limits exceeded. Risk-free 14-day Standard trial with no credit card. Custom plans available for large contact volumes.

From ecommerce to agentic commerce. Connect your data across your entire tech stack.
Explore the app marketplace
Join the 196,000+ customers growing with Klaviyo
See pricing
Frequently asked questions
What is Klaviyo?
Klaviyo is the
autonomous B2C CRM
and
AI marketing platform
that unifies customer data and automates email, SMS, RCS, WhatsApp, and mobile push to drive personalized, revenue-generating campaigns. Built as both a system of record and system of action, Klaviyo combines a customer data platform, real-time signals, and AI agents to power automated insights and one-click execution.
How much does Klaviyo cost? Is there a free plan?
Yes. Klaviyo offers a
free plan with core features
, and paid plans scale based on the number of contacts and channel usage (such as email and SMS). Enterprise pricing is also available for large organizations with advanced needs.
What integrations does Klaviyo offer?
Klaviyo offers native integrations with ecommerce platforms like
Shopify
, plus connectors for payment providers, CRMs, analytics tools, and messaging platforms. We also integrate with your favorite AI tools with our Klaviyo ChatGPT app, Klaviyo Claude Connector, and Klaviyo MCP for building agentic workflows. These integrations sync customer, product, and order data in real time to power personalized marketing and automation.
What channels does Klaviyo support?
Klaviyo unifies
email
,
SMS
/ Text, RCS, mobile push,
WhatsApp
and web events into a single customer profile so you can run consistent, data-driven
omnichannel marketing
.
That unified CDP + real-time signals power cross-channel flows, predictive analytics, and agent decisions to deliver more relevant messages where customers prefer to engage.
How does Klaviyo support enterprise brands?
For
enterprise brands
, Klaviyo is the unified B2C CRM built to replace fragmented legacy stacks — consolidating data, execution, and analytics into one secure, scalable platform. Unlike rigid suites that require constant developer intervention and data syncing, Klaviyo gives marketing teams the autonomy to launch sophisticated omnichannel campaigns across email, SMS, push, WhatsApp, and web in days, not months.
Built on a flexible data foundation with unified customer profiles, 350+ native integrations, and full developer tooling (APIs, webhooks, SDKs, warehouse syncs), Klaviyo deploys rapidly — with enterprise-grade security, audit-ready compliance, dedicated CSMs, and peak-season uptime backed by SLAs.

Frequently asked questions
What is included in the Klaviyo free plan?
The free plan allows you to create a Klaviyo account, import or sync your contacts and activity data, use the drag-and-drop email/SMS editors and build automations, segmentation and reports. On this tier you are limited to up to 250 active profiles (contacts who may receive marketing emails) and 500 email sends per month. Additionally, the free tier includes 150 SMS/MMS credits per month (region/network provider dependent).
Is Klaviyo’s free plan really free?
Yes – the free plan is available at no monthly cost as long as your account remains under the limits of 250 active profiles and 500 monthly email sends. However, if you exceed those limits (or require paid-plan features such as custom branding removal or advanced support) you will need to upgrade or your sending may be paused.
How long can I stay on the free plan?
You may remain on the free plan indefinitely as long as your active profile count remains at or below the 250-profile limit and your monthly sends stay at or below 500 emails. Once you have exceeded either threshold, your ability to send may be restricted. Note: With the free plan you receive full email support only for the first 60 days; after that you still have access to the Help Centre, community resources and training but not full support channels reserved for paid tiers.
Who is the Klaviyo free plan best for?
The free plan is best suited for small businesses, start-ups or brands just getting started with marketing automation who have relatively small contact lists (≤250 active profiles) and moderate sending needs (≤500 emails/month). It allows you to test Klaviyo’s platform, integrate your data, run automations and experiment with segmentation and SMS (via credits) without paying up front. As your audience, sends or sophistication grow, you’ll likely need to transition to a paid tier.
Can I use Klaviyo free plan for both email and text marketing?
Yes – the free plan supports both email marketing and text (SMS/MMS) marketing to a degree. On the free plan, you are allotted 150 SMS/MMS credits per month, so you can test mobile messaging campaigns.
Does the free plan include SMS or text message marketing?
Yes – the free plan includes 150 SMS/MMS credits per month, enabling you to send mobile messages in addition to email.
What integrations are available on the free plan?
The free plan supports the standard library of integrations (for example ecommerce platforms, CRMs, data sources) that Klaviyo offers. You are not blocked from connecting your tech stack just because you’re on the free tier. Many third-party reviewers note that Klaviyo’s core integrations are included.
What happens when I exceed the free plan limits?
Once you have exceeded the free plan’s limits (e.g. more than 250 active profiles or more than 500 email sends in a month), your account will no longer be able to send additional emails or messages until the next billing cycle or until you upgrade to a paid plan. You’ll be prompted to upgrade to continue sending.
Does the free plan include customer support?
Yes, but with limitations: free plan users receive email support for the first 60 days after sign-up. After that, you’ll have access to the Klaviyo Community and self-service resources (Help Centre, Academy) rather than full support channels reserved for paid tiers.
Is Klaviyo’s free plan good for ecommerce stores on Shopify, Wix or WooCommerce?
Yes – the free plan can absolutely work for ecommerce stores (on Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix, etc.) that are just starting out, testing email + SMS or sending to smaller audiences. Because Klaviyo supports integrations with major ecommerce platforms and gives you access to segmentation and automation even on the free plan, it’s a useful entry point. As your store and list grow (beyond the 250-contact limit or high-volume sends), you’ll want to move to a paid tier.
How do I upgrade from Klaviyo free to a paid plan?
Upgrading from the free plan is straightforward: in your Klaviyo account, head to Account Settings → Billing (or Change Plan), review your active profile count and required sends, select the paid tier that matches your needs and complete the upgrade. Once upgraded, your account unlocks paid-plan features (no send or profile limits on that tier), plus enhanced support, branding removal, etc.

Composer
Your AI campaign agent
Composer audits your flows, segments, and forms to find your best revenue opportunity—and then builds the entire on-brand campaign to capture it, from a single prompt and grounded in your real customer data.
Explore Composer
Your AI campaign agent
Klaviyo's AI helps teams discover opportunities, build launch-ready campaigns, and optimize performance — all grounded in your actual customer data, flow history, and 14+ years of marketing intelligence across 193,000+ brands.
Opportunity
Marketing teams know there's more performance in their Klaviyo account, but translating data into executed campaigns is manual and time-intensive — leaving growth opportunities untouched and teams focused on production instead of strategy.
Example
A marketer describes a goal — "launch a summer re-engagement campaign for customers who haven't purchased in 90 days" — and Composer identifies the right audience, drafts email and SMS content, sequences the timing, and queues everything for review, in minutes.
Value
Go from marketing goal to launch-ready campaign in minutes
Uncover the highest-impact opportunities across your flows, segments, and campaigns
Stay in control with marketer review and approval before anything goes live
Try Composer now
Customer Agent
Customer data from every conversation
With profile enrichment, every conversation improves your customer data in real time — shopper preferences and intent are written back to the profile automatically, so each interaction feeds sharper segmentation, personalization, and flows.
Explore profile enrichment
Customer profile enrichment
Customer data enrichment
Understanding identity resolution in Klaviyo
Customer data from every conversation
Customer Agent now writes data captured during a conversation — preferences, answers, and choices — directly back to a shopper's Klaviyo profile in real time, turning every support interaction into a zero-party data collection moment.
Opportunity
Customer Agent can have rich, personalized conversations with shoppers, but the preferences and intent signals captured during those conversations have had no way to reach the rest of Klaviyo — leaving valuable zero-party data siloed in service and out of reach for marketing.
Example
A shopper tells Customer Agent they prefer a medium fit and fragrance-free products. Those preferences are written directly to their Klaviyo profile and immediately used to power personalized flows, segmentation, and product recommendations — no manual data work required.
Value
Turn every support conversation into a zero-party data collection moment
Power smarter segmentation, flows, and personalization from what shoppers tell your agent
Close the loop between service and marketing without any custom development
Learn more
Support in 100+ languages
Customer Agent detects the language a shopper writes in and replies fluently across 100+ languages — on web chat, email, SMS, and WhatsApp. Set it up once in English; there's no separate configuration to maintain for each market.
Explore multilingual support
K:AI Customer Agent
Getting started with Customer Agent
Understanding Customer Agent skills
Support in 100+ languages
Customer Agent now automatically detects and responds in whatever language a shopper writes in — across web chat, email, SMS, and WhatsApp — so brands configure their agent once and serve customers in 100+ languages without duplicating setup per market.
Opportunity
International merchants need to support shoppers in their native language, but setting up and maintaining separate agent configurations per language or market creates significant operational overhead and slows expansion.
Example
A French brand configures their Customer Agent once in French. A Spanish-speaking shopper reaches out on WhatsApp and receives an instant, accurate response in Spanish — no additional setup, no separate market configuration required.
Value
Configure your agent once and serve shoppers in 100+ languages automatically
Expand into new international markets without duplicating setup per language
Deliver native-language support across web chat, email, SMS, and WhatsApp
Learn more
Custom agents without engineering
A new conversational agent builder turns a plain-language description into a working agent: skills, workflows, and logic included. No manual setup, no engineering queue. It's the fastest way to put a new use case live, the same way you'd brief a teammate.
Explore the agent builder
Customer agent adds custom skills, tools & agent guidance
Understanding skills vs. tools
Understanding Customer Agent skills
Custom agents without engineering
A conversational interface that lets you configure Customer Agent — skills, tools, workflows, and escalation rules — by describing what you want in plain language, so you can go from zero to a working agent setup without manual configuration or outside help.
Opportunity
Configuring a Customer Agent is powerful but complex — skills, tools, escalation rules, and knowledge each live in separate editors, and building a well-functioning agent typically requires an implementation partner or solutions architect just to get started.
Example
A CX manager types "I want the agent to handle return requests, ask for an order number, and escalate to a human if the customer is frustrated" — and the builder generates the skill configuration, asks a clarifying follow-up, and produces a working setup ready to test, without the manager touching a single manual editor.
Value
Configure Customer Agent through a conversation, not a manual setup process
Reduce time-to-value without needing an implementation partner or solutions architect
Iterate on your agent setup faster as your business needs evolve
Learn more
Social marketing
Instagram, connected to your profiles
Connect Instagram DMs, comments, mentions, and UGC directly to customer profiles. Social actions update segments and trigger flows in real time, and the content your customers create becomes a searchable library you can reuse across channels.
Explore social marketing
Introducing Klaviyo Social Marketing
Social marketing
Use the Social Content Library
Instagram, connected to your profiles
Connect Instagram engagement — comments, DMs, and mentions — directly to Klaviyo customer profiles, turning social interactions into consented subscribers, segmentation signals, and triggers for automated flows, with a centralized content library for user-generated and owned content.
Opportunity
Brands invest heavily in social to drive discovery and engagement, but social activity stays trapped inside platforms they don't control — followers never make it into the marketing system, and social behavior has no way to inform segmentation, flows, or personalization.
Example
A shopper comments on an Instagram post to claim a discount, receives an auto-reply that captures their email, and is automatically added to a welcome flow — then, when they post about their purchase, the brand pulls that UGC into a product email sent to customers with similar buying behavior.
Value
Convert Instagram followers into owned, addressable subscribers automatically
Trigger flows and build segments from real social engagement data
Turn user-generated content into reusable marketing assets across email, SMS, and onsite
Learn more
Custom object expansion
Warehouse data, in Klaviyo
Bring data from Snowflake, Databricks, and BigQuery dir

By entering your email and hitting subscribe, you consent to receive marketing communications (such as newsletters, blog posts, webinars, event invitations and new product updates), and targeted advertising from Klaviyo from time to time. You can unsubscribe from our emails at any time by clicking the Unsubscribe link at the bottom of our emails. For more information on how we process your personal information and what rights you have in this respect, see our
Privacy Policy
.

pricing.notes: Usage-based, not seat-based — pricing scales with profile count and messaging volume (mobile message credits, Composer credits). Sample configuration shows $45/mo total. Service, Composer, and Customer Agent products currently show 30% OFF promotional discount. Free tier includes 10K Composer credits (upsell hook for AI). Multiple regional storefronts (US/DE/AU/UK/SG/ES/FR/IT).

Integrations | Customer.io
Website Data Collection Preferences

Privacy Policy
and
Cookie Declaration
. By clicking 'I Accept,' you consent to the use of cookies and other tracking technologies.
I accept
Platform
Solutions
Pricing
Resources
Sign in
Get started
Get started
Book a demo
Book a demo
Customer.io Integrations
Integrate
your
favorite
tools
Synchronize your data to unlock the full potential of the tools you rely on most. Gain actionable insights and drive personalized experiences by activating your tech stack with seamless data connectivity.
Sources
Integrate your data warehouses and other sources to personalize and power your campaigns. Connect your first-party data via pre-built integrations, APIs, SDKs, webhooks, and more.
Source catalog
Destinations
Effortlessly transfer data to external destinations. Customer.io supports multiple integration options for key use cases like campaign reporting or the creation of lookalike audiences for ads.
Destination catalog
Customer top picks
Featured
integrations
Amazon S3
Streamline data transfer from Customer.io to Amazon S3 storage, including messages, people, metrics, and more.
Learn more
Amplitude
Enhance your audience insights by integrating Amplitude's data with your user and analytics data.
Learn more
Branch
Enable seamless email-to-app linking by integrating Branch with your messaging workflows.
Learn more
Salesforce
Sync customer data and trigger personalized campaigns based on sales activities, deal stages, and CRM updates to create seamless experiences across your sales and marketing funnel.
Learn more
Facebook Lead Ads
Sync Customer.io data with Facebook campaigns to convert leads to customers or users.
Learn more
Google Ads
Automatically export Customer.io segments as audiences for Ad Networks, perfect for lookalike or retargeting campaigns.
Learn more
Mixpanel
Leverage Mixpanel in combination with your user and analytics data for a deeper understanding of your audience's behaviors.
Learn more
Snowflake
Transfer Customer.io data, including messages, people, and metrics, to your Snowflake warehouse via Amazon S3 or Google Cloud Project (GCP) storage.
Learn more
Twilio
Utilize Twilio’s SMS action in Customer.io for seamless communication with your customers.
Learn more
Typeform
Integrate forms with your workspace to add people automatically and trigger campaigns based on submissions.
Learn more
Segment
Filter and map event and attribute data as both a destination and source with Segment.
Learn more
Hubspot
Connect your HubSpot CRM data to deliver targeted messaging based on contact properties, deal progression, and marketing interactions for unified customer engagement.
Learn more
See all integrations
See all integrations

+
Google
Cloud
A smarter, faster way to buy Customer.io—using your existing Google Cloud credits.

free_tier.limits: 14-day free trial only; no permanent free tier (Startup Program: 12 months free for companies that raised under $10M)

tiers.name: Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5k profiles, 1M emails/mo, 2 object types, visual workflow builder, AI Agent (standard), basic integrations

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom profile/email volume, 10 object types, elevated AI Agent, daily routines, HIPAA*, premium chat + 90-day onboarding

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Best volume pricing, custom Agent limits, dedicated CSM, dedicated hardware, audit logging, migration support, shared Slack

pricing.notes: Essentials billed monthly; Premium/Enterprise billed annually. Unlimited user seats on all plans. Overages: $0.009 per additional profile, $0.12 per additional 1,000 emails, $10 per 100K AI credits (negotiated on Enterprise). HIPAA is 'additional cost' on Premium/Enterprise. Startup Program grants 12 months free for early-stage companies raising under $10M.

GOT QUESTIONS?
WE'VE GOT ANSWERS.
What makes us the best newsletter platform?
beehiiv combines powerful newsletter features, a no-code website builder, advanced analytics, and the industry's largest native ad network in one platform. Its ease of use, combined with a full suite of growth and monetization features, makes it the best newsletter platform for creators and brands of any size.
Can I integrate my existing email list from another newsletter platform?
Yes, you can import subscribers from other platforms in just minutes. Check out our
migration resources here
.
Does beehiiv support selling digital products?
Absolutely. Our newsletter platform lets you monetize your content directly by selling digital products and paid subscriptions, without needing any additional tools or software.
Can I create a newsletter without prior design experience?
Yes. Our platform includes drag-and-drop templates and intuitive editing tools, making it one of the best publishing platforms for beginners and pros alike.
Can I send SMS messages from beehiiv?
beehiiv is an email-focused publishing platform. You cannot send SMS natively, but you can connect to third-party services via our API or webhooks to send messages in response to events or triggers from your beehiiv account.
Is beehiiv suitable for small businesses?
Absolutely. Its user-friendly interface, drag-and-drop editor, and pre-built templates make it easy for small businesses to send professional email newsletters without writing a single line of code.
Can I track the performance of my newsletters?
Of course. beehiiv provides in-depth analytics to track performance and engagement for your newsletter and website, helping you grow your audience over time.
Can you try it for free first, then upgrade later?
Yes! The Launch plan offers a free entry point to the beehiiv ecosystem, providing the essential features you need to get started. As your subscriber list grows and you need more advanced growth and monetization features, you can upgrade to our Scale or Max plans.

Frequently Asked Questions
Are newsletters considered a form of media?
Newsletters are indeed considered a form of media. They serve as a medium for sharing information, engaging with audiences, and distributing content, much like other traditional and digital media outlets.
How do creators use newsletters effectively?
Creators use newsletters effectively by consistently delivering engaging content, building authentic connections with their audience, utilizing growth strategies to expand their subscriber list, and leveraging monetization options to generate revenue from their newsletters.
What impact do social media algorithms have on content creators?
Social media algorithms significantly influence content creators by determining the visibility and reach of their posts. These algorithms prioritize certain types of content, affecting engagement and ultimately impacting growth and monetization opportunities for creators.
How can creators leverage media to enhance their newsletter content?
Creators can leverage media to enhance their newsletter content by incorporating visuals, audio, and video elements that engage readers and complement the text, ultimately enriching the storytelling experience and attracting a wider audience.
Are newsletters an effective tool for creators to engage with their audience?
Newsletters are an effective tool for creators to engage with their audience. They provide a direct, personalized channel for communication, fostering stronger connections and encouraging ongoing interaction with subscribers.
How can newsletters boost media exposure?
Newsletters can significantly boost media exposure by directly engaging and expanding audiences through targeted content delivery, enhancing brand visibility, and fostering relationships that encourage sharing across platforms.
What strategies do creators use in newsletters?
Creators use various strategies in newsletters, including segmenting their audience for targeted content, creating engaging and valuable material, utilizing strong calls-to-action, and incorporating analytics to refine their approach for better engagement and monetization.
Can social media expand newsletter reach?
Social media can significantly expand newsletter reach by effectively promoting content, engaging audiences, and driving traffic to subscription links. Leveraging social platforms allows creators to tap into wider demographics and attract new subscribers.
Do creators prefer media or newsletters?
Creators often prefer newsletters over other media formats due to their potential for direct engagement, personalized communication, and the ability to effectively monetize their content. Newsletters allow creators to build c

Frequently Asked Questions
Is beehiiv free to use?
Yes. beehiiv's Launch plan is free, forever, with no credit card required. You get up to 2,500 subscribers, unlimited email sends, and access to beehiiv's core newsletter, website, and podcast tools. When you're ready to unlock monetization, advanced analytics, AI tools, and more, paid plans start at $49/month.
What is the difference between beehiiv Scale and beehiiv Max plans?
Both plans include unlimited email sends, automations, the beehiiv Ad Network, paid subscription tools, digital products, and advanced analytics. Max adds several key upgrades: the ability to remove beehiiv branding from your newsletter and website, dynamic content, priority support, and up to 10 publications per account (vs. 3 on Scale). If a white-label experience, advanced features, and faster support matter to your operation, Max is the step up worth taking.
Does beehiiv take a cut of paid newsletter revenue?
No. beehiiv takes 0% of your paid subscription revenue. You keep everything you earn, minus Stripe's standard processing fee of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. Compare that to platforms like Substack, which takes 10% off the top of every subscription.
Does beehiiv charge extra for email sends?
No. All beehiiv plans, including the free Launch plan, include unlimited email sends. You're never penalized for sending more frequently or for emailing your full list.

Frequently asked questions
What tools does beehiiv integrate with?
beehiiv natively integrates with tools across ecommerce, payments, CRM, analytics, automation, forms, and more. Through Zapier, you can connect to thousands of additional apps.
Can I connect tools not listed here?
Yes. Use Zapier or Make to connect thousands of apps to beehiiv, or use the beehiiv API and webhooks to build workflows for tools that are not listed on this page.
Do I need a developer to set up integrations?
Most integrations connect in a few clicks from your beehiiv dashboard — no code required. If you need a custom workflow with the API or webhooks, a developer can help, but many teams set those up without engineering support.
Does beehiiv integrate with Stripe?
Yes. Connect Stripe to accept payments, sell paid subscriptions, and manage revenue directly through beehiiv.
Does beehiiv integrate with Shopify?
Yes. beehiiv supports Shopify integrations for content ingestion, ecommerce workflows, and connecting your store to your newsletter.
Does beehiiv integrate with Zapier?
Yes. beehiiv connects to thousands of apps through Zapier, so you can automate subscriber sync, content workflows, CRM updates, and more without writing code.
Can I build custom integrations?
Yes. Use the beehiiv API, Send API, and webhooks to build custom integrations for your stack. Full documentation is available at developers.beehiiv.com.

tiers.headline_inclusions: Ad Network, Boosts, 0% take rate paid subs, automations, surveys, webhooks, MCP write, 3 seats

pricing.notes: Pricing scales with subscriber count (1K/2.5K/5K/10K/25K/50K/75K/100K tiers). Starting prices shown are for lowest subscriber band. 100K+ subscribers requires Enterprise contact-sales. Annual billing offers ~12% discount ($71/yr off Scale, $157/yr off Max).

landing.title: Resend · Email for developers
landing.text: Resend · Email for developers Open main menu Features Company Resources Help Docs AI Pricing Log in Get started Announcing Resend Forward Email for developers The best way to reach humans instead of spam folders. Deliver transactional and marketing emails at scale. Get started Documentation Companies of all sizes trust Resend to deliver their most important emails. Integrate this morning A simple, elegant interface so you can start sending emails in minutes. It fits right into your code with SDKs for your favorite programming languages. Every time an email is delivered, opened, bounces, or a link is clicked. Learn more Write using a delightful editor A modern editor that makes it easy for anyone to write, format, and send emails. Visually build your email and change the design by adding custom styles. Styles Weekly Acme Newsletter a day ago Test Send From your.name@acme.com To Newsletter Subscribers Subject Weekly Newsletter Go beyond editing Group and control your contacts in a simple and intuitive way. Straightforward analytics and reporting tools that will help you send better emails. Contact management Import your list in minutes, regardless the size of your audience. Get full visibility of each contact and their personal attributes. Learn more Broadcast analytics Unlock powerful insights and understand exactly how your audience is interacting with your broadcast emails. Learn more Develop emails using React Create beautiful templates without having to deal with layouts and HTML. Powered by react-email, our open source component library. URL 63 ? ` https:// ${ process . env . URL } ` 64 : '' ; 65 66 export default WelcomeEmail ; Welcome to ACME , user! Hello Steve, We're excited to have you onboard at ACME . We hope you enjoy your journey with us. If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out. Get Started Cheers, The ACME Team Reach humans, not spam folders Proactive blocklist tracking Be the first to know if your domain is added to a DNSBLs such as those offered by Spamhaus with removal requests generated by Resend. Faster time to inbox Send emails from the region closest to your users. Reduce delivery latency with North American, South American, European, and Asian regions. Build confidence with BIMI Showcase your logo and company branding with BIMI . Receive guidance to obtain a VMC - the email equivalent of a checkmark on social media. Managed dedicated IPs Get a fully managed dedicated IP that automatically warms up and autoscales based on your sending volume, no waiting period. Dynamic suppression list Prevent repeated sending to recipients who no longer want your email and comply with standards like the CAN-SPAM Act and others. IP and domain monitoring Monitor your DNS configuration for any errors or regressions. Be notified of any changes that could hinder your deliverability. Verify DNS records Protect your reputation by verifying your identity as a legitimate sender. Secure your email communication using DKIM and SPF . Battle-tested infrastructure Rely on a platform of reputable IP's used by trustworthy senders with distributed workloads across different IP pools. Prevent spoofing with DMARC Avoid impersonation by creating DMARC policies and instructing inbox providers on how to treat unauthenticated email. Resend is transforming email for developers. Simple interface, easy integrations, handy templates. What else could we ask for. Guillermo Rauch CEO at Vercel Send with Next.js Everything in your control All the features you need to manage your email sending, troubleshoot with detailed logs, and protect your domain reputation – without the friction. Intuitive analytics Full visibility Domain authentication Beyond expectations Resend is driving remarkable developer experiences that enable success stories, empower businesses, and fuel growth across industries and individuals. " Our team loves Resend. It makes email sending so easy and reliable. After we switched to Dedicated IPs, our deliverability improved tremendously and we don't hear complaints about emails landing on spam anymore. " Vlad Matsiiako Co-founder of Infisical " I've used Mailgun, Sendgrid, and Mandrill and they don't come close to providing the quality of developer experience you get with Resend. "
Our team loves Resend. It makes email sending so easy and reliable. After we switched to Dedicated IPs, our deliverability improved tremendously and we don't hear complaints about emails landing on spam anymore.
"
Vlad Matsiiako
Co-founder of Infisical
"
I've used Mailgun, Sendgrid, and Mandrill and they don't come close to providing the quality of developer experience you get with Resend.
"
Brandon Strittmatter
Co-founder of Outerbase
"
Resend is an amazing product. It was so easy to switch over. I feel confident knowing that our important emails are in good hands with Resend. Everyone should be using this.
"
Shariar Kabir
Founder at Ruby Card
"
All of our customers are located in South America, so having a solution that could send emails from the region closest to our users is very important. Resend's multi-region feature is a game-changer for us.
"
Giovanni Keppelen
CTO & Partner at VOA Hoteis
"
The speed and ease of integrating with the product was incredible, but what really stood out was their intricate knowledge of email and relentless support day or night. Oh and we also ended up winning Product of the week.
"
Sam Ducker
Co-founder of Anyone
"

Import millions of contacts from a CSV in a single upload, with an API, AI column mapping, and full SDK coverage.

The Broadcast and Template editors now include an emoji picker.

Domain Claim

May 26, 2026
Official Resend plugin for Claude Code
Install the MCP server and every Resend skill directly from the official Claude Code plugins.
Felipe Freitag
May 7, 2026
Auth0 Integration
Send Auth0 transactional emails through Resend using the official integration.
Christina Martinez
May 5, 2026
Mentions in AI chats
Reference existing content in AI prompt across broadcasts, templates, and automations.
Apr 30, 2026
New Chart Component
Embed bar, line, and area charts directly in your emails.
Apr 9, 2026
Logs API
Access your API request logs from anywhere.
Felipe Freitag
Apr 7, 2026
Official Resend MCP Server
Our official MCP server with Resend platform coverage, and an official HTTP transport.
Apr 2, 2026
Async Support for the Python SDK
Send emails asynchronously in Python using the new async methods powered by httpx.
Derich Pacheco
Mar 13, 2026
Official CLI for Resend
Built for humans and AI agents. Manage your emails from the terminal.

Introducing the New Email Editor
A completely rebuilt editor for broadcasts and templates, now available to everyone.
+
2

Domain Verification Events

+
1

Alexandre Cisneiros

Brian Kerr
Jan 26, 2026
Webhooks Ingester
A self-hosted solution to store all your Resend webhook events in your own database.
Jan 22, 2026
Webhook Event Visibility
A backwards-compatible change in the way we share webhook events.
+
1
Jan 15, 2026
Bulk Actions
Perform actions on multiple items at once in the Dashboard.
Danilo Woznica

Introducing Email Suppression Visibility
Learn how the new suppressed status gives you visibility into your email performance.

Exports is now generally available for all Resend users.

Create, retrieve, list, and delete webhooks programmatically.

List Sent Emails Endpoint
List sent emails from your account.

We've added optional pagination for list endpoints to optimize retrieving data.

Download Attachments
You can now view and download attachments for emails in the dashboard.
Vitor Capretz
Sep 24, 2025
Tags for Batch and Scheduled Emails
Add tags to batch and scheduled emails.
Vitor Capretz
Sep 19, 2025
Batch Validation Modes
Use batch validation modes to control how emails are validated in batch sending.
Pedro Gomes
Aug 21, 2025
Automatic Plain Text Emails
Resend now automatically generates plain text for your emails.
Isabella Aquino
Aug 14, 2025
Embed Images using CID
Learn how to inline image attachments in your emails.
Alexandre Cisneiros

Keyboard Shortcut Visibility

Custom Return Path
Set a custom return path for your domain.
Isabella Aquino
May 8, 2025
Get Contact by Email
Get a contact by their email address.
Carolina Josephik
May 1, 2025
Idempotency Keys
Use idempotency keys to ensure that emails are sent only once.
Apr 22, 2025
Deliverability Insights GA

Chris Pennington
Apr 17, 2025
Extended Email Scheduling
Schedule emails up to 30 days in advance using Broadcasts or the API.
Felipe Volpone

Domains Search and Filters
Quickly find or filter through your domains with ease.

analysis.name: Resend
analysis.value_proposition: The best way to reach humans instead of spam folders — deliver transactional and marketing emails at scale via a developer-first API.
analysis.ideal_customer: Developers and engineering teams at startups and scaleups sending transactional and marketing email who want a modern API-first alternative to SendGrid/Mailgun/Postmark

differentiators: First-class developer experience built by engineers for engineers
React-based email templating via open source react-email library
Multi-region sending (available to free users)
AI-native platform with MCP server, Claude Code plugin, and Vercel Chat SDK adapter for AI agents
Proactive DNSBL/Spamhaus blocklist tracking with automatic removal requests
Modern email editor rebuilt for broadcasts and templates
Broad SDK coverage (Node, Python, Ruby, PHP, Go, Rust, Java, Elixir, .NET) plus CLI

'Resend's multi-region feature is a game-changer for us' — Giovanni Keppelen, VOA Hoteis
'The Resend team have built a great product in a space that hasn't seen 10x innovation for years' — Roberto Riccio, Alliance

free_tier.limits: 3,000 emails/mo, 100/day, 1 domain, 5 AI credits, 10K automation runs, 30-day retention, 1 webhook endpoint

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3K emails/mo, 100/day, 1 domain, 5 AI credits, ticket support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50K emails/mo, 10 domains, 100 AI credits, no daily limit, $0.90/1K overage

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.headline_inclusions: 100K emails/mo, 1,000 domains, 500 AI credits, Slack support, dedicated IP add-on

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom volume, flexible domains/retention, priority support, urgent SLA, deliverability expertise

pricing.notes: Volume-based flat pricing (not seat-based) with slider from 3K to 3M+ emails/mo. Pay-as-you-go overage: $0.90 per 1,000 extra emails on paid plans. Automation runs: 10K/mo free, then $0.0015/run on paid plans. Dedicated IPs $30/mo add-on, available to Scale customers exceeding 3,000 emails/day. Marketing vs transactional email tabs shown separately.

analysis.name: ConvertKit (Kit)
analysis.tagline: Your email list should be working harder for you
analysis.value_proposition: Email marketing platform for creators to grow their list, identify high-value subscribers, and monetize every send.
analysis.ideal_customer: Professional creators — authors, YouTubers, podcasters, course creators, musicians, bloggers, coaches, newsletter operators

free_tier.limits: Up to 1,000 subscribers; 1 basic Visual Automation; limited automations

tiers.name: Newsletter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 basic Visual Automation, unlimited landing pages/forms/broadcasts, tagging, digital products

tiers.name: Creator
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited automations & sequences, Kit MCP, A/B test subjects, SMS, integrations, RSS, 24/7 support

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Adds Subscriber Signals, engagement analytics, unlimited users, deliverability reporting, referral system

pricing.notes: Prices anchored to 1,000 subscribers; scales with list size. Yearly plans save 17% ($390/yr Creator, $790/yr Pro). 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

We - and our partners - use cookies to deliver our services and to show you ads.
By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies as described in our
Cookie Policy (in English)
Accept
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Other
Other
Additional first-party and/or third-party cookies.

What’s new at ActiveCampaign
Watch Video
Highlights
Active Intelligence 2.8
Active Intelligence connectors
Contact import agent
Migration solution
WhatsApp templates
Active Intelligence 2.8
Campaigns you’d put your name on
Active Intelligence 2.8 starts from your brand, your best campaigns, and your voice, so every draft and automated sequence already looks like you built it.
Watch the overview
Memory that compounds every session
Active Intelligence remembers your rules so every session builds on the last instead of resetting to zero.
Watch video
Upload a doc, get a campaign
Drop in a brief, or reference a past campaign. Active Intelligence reads it, extracts key messages, and builds from what you already wrote, not from a generic template.
Watch video
Fix images without leaving the campaign
Hover any image, describe the change, and Active Intelligence generates a high quality version on the spot. Swap directly from your content library or pull from a URL, all without leaving the campaign editor.
Watch video
Small change, not a total rebuild
Keep what works in your past campaign describe what you need to change and everything else stays intact.
Watch video
Customize your AI experience
Set your company voice, audience details, and strategic priorities once—then Active Intelligence remembers them forever. Every campaign, automation, and recommendation automatically reflects your brand guidelines. Configure custom instructions in minutes and watch your AI suggestions become instantly more relevant.
Watch video
Active Intelligence connectors
Hyperpersonalize your campaigns with Connectors
Active Intelligence 2.8 builds campaigns from your brand, your templates, and your best-performing content, so the first draft already looks and sounds like you.  Connectors pull deeper context from across your tech stack–like Asana, Calendly, Google Ads, Stripe, Webflow and Wix to hyper-personalize your campaigns.
Learn how to set up the connectors
Contact import agent
Launch Campaigns Faster with Contact Import agent
Customers can upload a CSV or XLSX and let Active Intelligence handle the rest — mapping columns to existing fields, creating new custom fields where needed, and recommending lists and tags so contacts are campaign-ready on day one. No manual prep, no formatting errors
Learn more
Migration solution
Seamlessly Switch Platforms
The Migration Solution transforms the platform switching experience, working with our preferred partner and leveraging Active Intelligence to migrate your marketing assets from Mailchimp into ActiveCampaign, seamlessly and without the manual work.
Learn more
WhatsApp templates
Create WhatsApp templates more easily
Now, users can create and manage WhatsApp template messages directly in ActiveCampaign in a simpler way that aligns with Meta’s requirements. This makes it easier to build templates with a higher chance of approval and use them in campaigns and automations.
Learn more
Ready to take ActiveCampaign for a spin?
Try it free for 14 days.
Free 14-day trial with email sign-up

We - and our partners - use cookies to deliver our services and to show you ads.
By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies as described in our
Cookie Policy (in English)
Accept
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Other

Additional first-party and/or third-party cookies.

Still stuck? Have more questions? Reach out to our support team and we’ll guide you through your issue.

Share your thoughts, pain-points, suggestions, and ideas to help shape the future of ActiveCampaign.
Frequently asked questions
How can I use ActiveCampaign integrations to improve reporting and analytics?
ActiveCampaign works with tools like Google Sheets to make reporting faster and more flexible. You can automatically send contact, deal, or campaign data into a live spreadsheet to build custom reports, track performance, or blend data with other business metrics without needing manual exports. Combined with analytics tools like Looker Studio or BigQuery, you get full visibility into your marketing performance.
Do I need technical skills to set up integrations?
No coding required.
Most integrations connect in just a few clicks through our native connections or Zapier. Our
AI Campaign Builder
can even suggest which integrations to activate based on your business goals and existing tech stack. For Developers, we offer deeper API access, a low-code solution called
App Studio
, and webhook capabilities for custom client solutions.
Can I migrate my existing integrations from my current tool?
Yes. ActiveCampaign supports most major integrations available in competitors, plus many specialized tools that competitors don’t offer. Our onboarding specialists can help migrate your current automations, contact lists, and more to ActiveCampaign, often improving efficiency through our AI automation capabilities. Most customers find they can reduce their tech stack while gaining more powerful cross-channel orchestration.
How do integrations enable cross-channel marketing?
ActiveCampaign’s integrations allow you to
create a unified customer view where you can combine email marketing, SMS, website tracking, WhatsApp Messaging, and more
.
You can trigger automations based on actions within connected apps—like a purchase in Shopify, a support ticket in Zendesk, or a call log in Salesforce. These triggers can instantly launch cross-channel campaigns. This is autonomous marketing in action: your systems work together without manual intervention.
Example: When someone browses your connected Shopify or Wix store, our AI can automatically trigger a personalized email sequence, schedule an SMS follow-up, and adjust your Facebook ad targeting—all from a single workflow.
What’s the difference between native integrations and API access?
Our 1,000+ apps and integrations include many native integrations that work out of the box with pre-built features and require no development. The
ActiveCampaign API
provides unlimited flexibility for custom builds, allowing developers and agencies to create bespoke solutions for unique business needs. Both options leverage Active Intelligence to automate marketing decisions and execution across your connected tools.
Is it complicated or time-consuming to set up a new integration?
Not at all. We prioritize a frictionless setup so you can focus on building your campaigns, not troubleshooting connections. For hundreds of popular tools, the connection process is typically a simple
​
“
connect” button or copy-and-paste of an API key, allowing you to get up and running in minutes. You don’t need to be a developer to link critical apps like your CRM, e‑commerce platform, or lead generation tools.
What if I don’t see the specific, niche, or custom tool I use on the Apps page?
ActiveCampaign is designed to be the hub of your entire tech stack, even for unlisted or proprietary tools. You can use our comprehensive
Developer Tools
and
API documentation
to build your own custom connector. We also have a network of
Certified Consultants
available to help you build and implement integrations for unique systems, ensuring you can leverage ActiveCampaign’s power with any application your business relies on.
Ready to take ActiveCampaign for a spin?
Try it free for 14 days.
Free 14-day trial with email sign-up

Cookies Settings

Privacy Preferences Center
Your Privacy
Targeting Cookies
Performance Cookies
Functional Cookies
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Frequently asked questions
Do I have to enter my credit card details to sign up?
No. We only need your email address and the name of your organization, and then you will be able to start creating campaigns.
Do I need any prior knowledge or skills?
Not at all! Brevo is designed with simplicity in mind. Even if you're a complete beginner, you'll have all the tools you need to build stunning emails, create contact lists and set advanced preferences. If you ever need guidance, you can take a look at our many tutorials and resources, or contact our support team.
Can I send transactional emails on my plan?
Yes! All Brevo plans give you access to transactional email features, including RESTful APIs, SMTP, outbound webhooks, unlimited log retention, and more. Brevo integrates with all major CMS and our
API docs
are complete with guides, SDKs, libraries and code recipes to help you get started.
Are you committed to this plan?
You choose your commitment period when you sign up for a plan (monthly or yearly). There are no hidden fees with Brevo. Sign up for a plan or purchase credits as you need them, there are no additional fees.
Why choose a pay-as-you-go plan?
A pay-as-you-go plan is ideal for businesses and organizations that don't send emails often, or that don’t have a large contact list. PAYG credits do not expire, so you can use them at your own pace. One email sent equals one credit deducted. You still get all of our great features and services, however they do not include phone support. It is still possible to easily buy more credits or shift to a monthly plan at anytime though.
Can I try Brevo before purchasing a plan?
Absolutely! When you create an account, you will automatically have a Free plan to upload your contacts. Once we approve your account for sending, you can start sending up to 300 emails per day.
What if I change my mind?
If you change your mind, you can cancel your plan at any time directly from your account. Your data will be stored if you wish to use our services again, or we can delete all of your records upon your request.
How can I pay?
All payments are made by credit card, through our secure payment processor, Adyen, or by Paypal. If you subscribe to a monthly plan, the subscription period is 30 days and charges are processed at the beginning of each period. Email and SMS credits are charged at purchase. All statements are available within your account.
What is a dedicated IP?
A dedicated IP plan allows you to send email campaigns using your domain name and your own signature. You create transparency with your customers and build a reputation based on your IP and your domain name.
Don’t see your question answered here?
Contact us and we'll be happy to answer any additional questions you may have.

Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

free_tier.limits: Free forever, no credit card; best for individuals/solopreneurs

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free forever, no credit card needed — for individuals and solopreneurs building an online presence

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: From 5,000 emails/mo; email & SMS, drag-drop editor, templates, AI copy, segmentation, forms, basic analytics

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Starter + marketing automation, A/B testing, heatmaps, send-time optimization, web tracking, 1 landing page

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: From 150k emails/mo, WhatsApp/Popups/Push, 10 seats, contact scoring, AI segmentation, AI Data Analyst, phone support

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Multi-account, custom objects, mobile wallet, custom loyalty, custom data integrations, dedicated IP, SSO/SAML, CSM

tiers.name: Sales Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Sales CRM add-on for pipelines and sales automation

tiers.name: Sales Advanced
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced sales tier with expanded CRM and automation capabilities

pricing.notes: Pricing scales with monthly email volume — Starter starts at 5k emails/mo, Professional starts at 150k emails/mo. Yearly billing gives 10% discount. SMS credits sold separately. Sales tiers are per-seat while marketing tiers are flat volume-based. Enterprise reserved for 1M+ contacts with custom pricing.
